title: Initialize greenfield repo scaffold and runtime config
description: Set up app/package/service directories, base config loader, and startup scripts.
acceptance_criteria: Repo structure matches architecture spec
.env.example exists with required keys
Local API and web startup scripts are present

title: Implement project workspace with visible folders and isolation
description: Create project roots with Briefs, Questionnaires, Data, Mappings, Runs, Outputs, Logs. Enforce project-level path isolation in API.
acceptance_criteria: Project creation provisions standard folder tree
Cross-project reads/writes are rejected
Project folder tree is visible in UI

title: Add questionnaire generation endpoint with methodology selector
description: Generate questionnaire drafts for A&U, Segmentation, Drivers, Concept Monadic, Creative Monadic, Brand Equity Tracker, MaxDiff, TURF.
acceptance_criteria: All required methodologies are selectable
Generated draft returned in structured format
Draft persists under project Questionnaires folder

title: Implement in-app questionnaire editor and versioning
description: Allow manual edit and AI-assisted section rewrite/regeneration with version history.
acceptance_criteria: Users can edit questions and logic blocks
Section-level AI regenerate works
Versions v1..vn are tracked with metadata

title: Export questionnaire to DOCX and Decipher-ready structured output
description: Generate downloadable DOCX and Decipher-ready structured JSON output for current questionnaire version.
acceptance_criteria: DOCX export succeeds
Decipher-ready structured export succeeds
Export artifacts are versioned in project Outputs

title: Implement data upload and profiling
description: Support CSV/XLSX uploads up to 250MB with basic profile summary.
acceptance_criteria: Uploads up to 250MB succeed
Data profile includes row count and columns
Uploaded file metadata is persisted

title: Build editable questionnaire-to-data mapping workflow
description: Auto-suggest mapping and allow users to edit variable links, scales, segment vars, and save mapping versions.
acceptance_criteria: Auto-map suggestion is generated
Users can edit and save mapping
Mapping versions are retrievable per project

title: Generate core data tables from mapping config
description: Run frequency, multi-select, T2B, mean and segment crosstab outputs from mapped data.
acceptance_criteria: Core tables generate without manual code edits
Significance toggle works for crosstabs
Outputs are stored under run artifacts

title: Add analysis job runner with run provenance
description: Run jobs asynchronously and track inputs (data hash, mapping version, questionnaire version), status, and logs.
acceptance_criteria: Run statuses include queued/running/failed/completed
Each run stores provenance metadata
Logs include actionable failure messages

title: Implement Drivers suite: ridge/logistic + Pearson + weighted-effects
description: Provide unified drivers run output package including all required drivers analyses.
acceptance_criteria: Ridge/logistic outputs generated
Pearson outputs generated
Weighted-effects outputs generated

title: Implement segmentation run: VarClus + KMeans profiling
description: Run segmentation pipeline and produce profiling outputs.
acceptance_criteria: VarClus runs from mapped variables
KMeans outputs and profiles are generated
Outputs are downloadable

title: Implement MaxDiff + TURF run path
description: Support MaxDiff estimation and TURF output generation with saved run artifacts.
acceptance_criteria: MaxDiff run completes with expected output tables
TURF run completes with reach outputs
Run is tied to provenance metadata

title: Implement basic event and audit logs
description: Capture project actions, uploads, mapping saves, run starts/completions, and export events.
acceptance_criteria: Event log entries created for key actions
Logs can be filtered by project and run
Output files trace back to run metadata
